activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference
Mixed origins with per-article origin or invoice reference
EU origin normalization and extra EU countries in invoice

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'SKF Eurotrade AB' and country Sweden in the certificate exactly matches issuer name and address in the invoice. The consignor name is found in invoice header and address blocks without discrepancies. No contradictory data found. Rule 4.1.0 (consolidated search) and 4.1.4 (land match) applied resulting in MATCH.

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'PC Prompodshipnik' and country Ukraine from certificate found in invoice in Bill to, Sold to, and Ship to fields consistently. Countries match exactly after normalization. Rule 4.2.0.2 prioritized billing address fields with consistent results and 4.2.3 land verification passed.

goods_description.invoice_value: SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LUBRICANTS
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description with an explicit invoice number and date reference ('according to attached invoice'). Invoice details include matching product categories like bearings, seals, lubricants with multiple article numbers matching certificate's item numbers. Mixed origins indicated and allowed as per 4.3.7, goods description accepted with invoice reference per 4.3.5.

quantity.certificate_value:
10 packages
GW in KGs 598,102
NW in KGs 493,829
quantity.invoice_value:
Number of packages: 10
Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG
Total Net Weight 493,829 KG
quantity.motivation: Quantity of 10 packages verified by matching explicit '10 packages' in certificate and invoice. Gross weight 598,102 KG and net weight 493,829 KG in certificate exactly identified in invoice totals, consistent with no contradictions. Underrun or overrun within tolerances. Rules 4.4.3.2 (package quantity) and 4.4.4 (weight total) confirm MATCH.

origin.certificate_value: AT FR JP MX PL SE
origin.invoice_value: Austria, France, Japan, Mexico, Poland, Sweden
origin.motivation: Certificate lists multiple origin countries (Austria, France, Japan, Mexico, Poland, Sweden) which are explicitly stated and matched in the invoice's 'Country of manufacturing' column per item line. EU origin normalization applied allowing European Union as a grouping, with no contradictory non-EU entries in invoice. Rule 4.5.4.1 (EU origin normalization) applied with all countries identified.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points - consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin - match between the certificate and invoice after applying all relevant normalization and rules.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter i certifikatet stämmer överens med fakturan. Dokumenten är konsistenta och kan godkännas automatiskt.
